## Applications

#### Audio
- [CAVA](https://github.com/karlstav/cava) →  Cross-platform Audio Visualizer. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [Cider](https://cider.sh/) → Cross-platform Apple Music experience. ![Freeware](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/freeware14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [Audacity](https://www.audacityteam.org/) → Recording and editing sounds. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)

#### Backup
- [Rclone](https://rclone.org/) → A command-line program to manage files on cloud storage. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [Rclone browser](https://github.com/kapitainsky/RcloneBrowser) → A simple cross platform GUI for Rclone. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)

#### Communication
- [Discord](https://discord.com) → A instant messaging and VoIP social platform. ![Freeware](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/freeware14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [Fluxer](https://fluxer.app/) → Instant messaging app and VoIP social media platform. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [TeamSpeak 3](https://teamspeak.com) → A VoIP social platform. ![Freeware](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/freeware14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- ![Star](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/star14.png?raw=true) [Vesktop](https://vesktop.dev/) → Customizable and privacy friendly Discord desktop client. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)

#### Compression
- [7-Zip](http://www.7-zip.org/) → Utility for manipulating archives. Formats 7z, ZIP, GZIP, BZIP2 and TAR are supported fully, other formats can be unpacked. ![Freeware](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/freeware14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [WinRAR](http://www.rarlab.com/) →  A powerful archive manager. It can backup your data and reduce the size of email attachments, decompress RAR, ZIP and other files. ![Freeware](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/freeware14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)

- [LocalSend](https://github.com/localsend/localsend) → Cross-platform alternative to AirDrop ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [OpenRGB](https://openrgb.org/) → RGB Sync with multiple brand support. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [qBittorrent](https://www.qbittorrent.org/) → BitTorrent client. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [QDirStat](https://github.com/shundhammer/qdirstat) → Graphical disk usage analyzer. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true)
- [QDiskInfo](https://github.com/edisionnano/QDiskInfo) → A utility that monitors and displays the health of your hard drive, including basic information, S.M.A.R.T. values, and disk temperature. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true)
- [RustDesk](https://rustdesk.com/) → Remote Desktop. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [Stow](https://www.gnu.org/software/stow/) → Symlink farm manager. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true)
- [strace](https://strace.io/) → diagnostic, debugging and instructional userspace utility for Linux. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true)
- [Ventoy](https://www.ventoy.net/en/index.html) → Used for creating bootable USB media storage devices ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [VMWare Workstation Pro](https://www.vmware.com/products/desktop-hypervisor/workstation-and-fusion) →  Desktop hypervisor for local virtualization of virtual machines. ![Freeware](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/freeware14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true) [^VMWare]

#### Video
- [FFmpeg](https://ffmpeg.org/) → Suite of libraries and programs for handling video, audio, and other multimedia files and streams. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [Kooha](https://github.com/SeaDve/Kooha) → Simple screen recorder. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true)
- [Open Broadcaster Software (OBS)](https://obsproject.com/) → Video recording and live streaming software. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [VLC](https://www.videolan.org/vlc/) → Multimedia player and framework that plays most multimedia files as well as DVDs, Audio CDs, VCDs, and various streaming protocols. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)

#### Web Browser
- [Brave](https://brave.com) → Fast, secure, and privacy-focused Chromium browser that blocks ads and trackers, and offers a built-in VPN, AI assistant, and search engine. ![Freeware](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/freeware14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)
- [Ungoogled Chromium](https://github.com/ungoogled-software/ungoogled-chromium) → Chromium browser with a lightweight approach to removing Google web service dependency. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true)
- ![Star](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/star14.png?raw=true) [Zen Browser](https://zen-browser.app/) → Open-source fork of Mozilla Firefox, with its main focus being privacy and customizability. ![Open-Source Software](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/opensource14.png?raw=true) ![Apple](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/apple14.png?raw=true) ![Linux](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/linux14.png?raw=true) ![Windows](https://github.com/senkawolf/Software-List/blob/main/media/icons/windows14.png?raw=true)

[^VMWare]: See my VMWare install guide [here](https://github.com/SenkaWolf/Software-List/blob/main/docs/VMWARE-INSTALL-GUIDE.md).
